title: dev-azure-content-filter-block
description:
A new, separate failure pattern appeared in this window: story 17's dev persona run failed once at 2026-05-29T15:37:08.186968+00:00 after a long execution of 2191.776 seconds. The error text is explicit that the provider returned an Azure 400 with finish_reason=content_filter and a ResponsibleAI block action for model deepseek-v4-pro. This is not a continuation of sm-max-tokens-truncation-repeat; it is a different error class affecting a different persona.

The immediate impact is one blocked dev attempt on story 17 after roughly 36.5 minutes of elapsed runtime. In this window there is no corroborating retry cluster, no queue snapshot showing broader stall, and no tick activity to indicate systemic scheduler impact. Cost is reported as 0.0 on the failed run, so the measurable impact here is primarily time spent and interruption of story progress rather than direct spend.

Because the provider response names its own cause, the diagnostic clarity is high even though only one occurrence is present in this bundle. The available evidence supports a provider/model-policy block or factory interaction with that provider pathway, but does not yet show a broader repeated pattern across stories or intervals. L3 review is warranted for judgment on this clearly identified infrastructure-facing failure mode, while factory operation can continue.

evidence.summary_excerpt: Mostly quiet window with one new failed dev run on story 17 after a long execution (~36.5 minutes). The failure is provider-side and explicit: Azure returned a 400 content_filter block for model deepseek-v4-pro.

evidence.excerpt: story 17 dev run failed after 2191.776s on azure/deepseek-v4-pro: "AzureException - Error code: 400 ... 'finish_reason': 'content_filter' ... 'ResponsibleAI result indicated block action.'"
{"noteworthy":"One failed dev run for story 17 ended with an explicit Azure content_filter 400 block on deepseek-v4-pro after a 2191.8s run; the error text is self-diagnosing"}
{"noteworthy":"Only one failure for (story 17, dev); below retry-storm threshold."}

escalation_reason: Single clearly diagnosed infrastructure/provider-facing pattern: a dev run on story 17 failed at 2026-05-29T15:37:08.186968+00:00 with Azure 400 content_filter / ResponsibleAI block on deepseek-v4-pro after 2191.776s. Although only one occurrence is present, the cause is explicit and the impact is non-trivial due to a blocked story attempt and >5 minutes duration, so L3 judgment is useful now rather than waiting for another burn.
